title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 233.145 - Records of board
text:
233.145.  Records of board. — Said board shall keep a full and complete record of all moneys received, showing from whom and on what account any moneys are received, giving the amount received on each particular item; and also of all moneys disbursed, to whom any moneys are paid, and for what purpose it is paid.
(RSMo 1939 § 8684) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 8035; 1919 § 10811; 1909 § 10587
